title: Tech Advances on Hopes For AI Outlook - Tech Roundup
description:
Shares of technology companies rose as traders bet the artificial-intelligence boom will survive an energy shock.
Chip makers continued a recent recovery rally, led by formerly embattled Intel.

title: AI machine sorts clothes faster than humans to boost textile recycling in China
description: In an industrial park in Zhangjiagang, a small city on China's east coast, a large humming and hissing machine feeds on piles of used clothes and sorts them. The novelty? It uses artificial intelligence to sort them by composition at high speed, offering a glimpse into how AI could play…
content:
In an industrial park in Zhangjiagang, a small city on China's east coast, a large humming and hissing machine feeds on piles of used clothes and sorts them.

title: On International Fact-Checking Day, refresh AI identification skills
description: Artificial intelligence-generated content is everywhere these days, making it increasingly difficult to separate fact from fiction, particularly when it comes to breaking news.
content:
By MELISSA GOLDIN and BARBARA WHITAKER
Artificial intelligence-generated content is everywhere these days, making it increasingly difficult to separate fact from fiction, particularly when it comes to breaking news.
